返回本批次

日本 X 现在是美国人最喜欢的互联网角落

Japanese X is now America's favorite corner of the internet

www.japantimes.co.jp 作者 mikhael 分数 50 评论 8 2026/04/02 22:57
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. X 上的人工智能翻译和算法变化出人意料地通过共享内容将美国和日本用户联系起来，凸显了社交媒体平台跨文化交流的承诺。 | 429158655
  2. 2026 年 4 月 1 日
  3. 一个经常看似促进分裂的平台正在将人们聚集在一起寻求变革——而美国人正在体验互联网最后一个未被发现的伟大部分之一的乐趣。X（以前称为 Twitter）的美国用户本周末遭到了日语帖子的轰炸，这要归功于人工智能支持的自动翻译以及看起来像是对动态填充算法的改变。这是 X 的两个最大用户群的罕见交叉，直到最近这都是不可能的。它始于两个国家的共同热情：烤肉。长崎附近的佐世保市是美国海军基地所在地，一名日本用户分享了一张美国士兵在一家烤肉店兴奋地烤培根的图。该帖子旨在展示居民如何“与如此酷而有趣的邻居一起生活”，随后又发布了一张真实的美国人烧烤的照片。它很快引起了全球的关注，浏览量接近 5000 万，并引发了太平洋两岸大量有益健康的帖子。
  4. 在错误信息和信息过多的时代，高质量的新闻比以往任何时候都更加重要。通过订阅，您可以帮助我们正确报道故事。立即订阅

Original Summary

  1. AI translation and algorithm changes on X unexpectedly connected American and Japanese users through shared content, highlighting the social media platform’s promise of cross-cultural exchange. | 429158655
  2. Apr 1, 2026
  3. A platform that so often seems to promote division is bringing people together for a change — and Americans are learning the joy of one of the last great undiscovered parts of the internet.U.S.-based users of X, formerly known as Twitter, were this weekend bombarded with Japanese-language posts, thanks to AI-enabled auto-translation and what looks like a change to the feed-populating algorithm. It’s a rare crossover of X’s two biggest user bases, one that would have been impossible until recently.It started with a shared passion of both nations: grilling meat. A Japanese user in Sasebo, a city near Nagasaki that’s home to a U.S. Navy base, shared a drawing of U.S. soldiers excitedly grilling bacon at a yakiniku restaurant. The post aimed to show how residents "live alongside such cool and fun neighbors,” and was followed by another with a photo of actual Americans barbecuing. It quickly got global attention, racking up nearly 50 million views, and leading to a flood of wholesome posts from both sides of the Pacific.
  4. In a time of both misinformation and too much information, quality journalism is more crucial than ever.By subscribing, you can help us get the story right. SUBSCRIBE NOW

评论（默认中文）

kalleboo 2026/04/03 15:12
我真希望 Elon 将 X 的日本部分卖给了雅虎/软银。他本来可以收回他花在上面的所有钱，然后它就可以成为自己的东西了。
I really wish Elon had sold off the Japanese side of X to Yahoo/Softbank. He could probably have made back everything he spent on it in the first place and then it could be its own thing.
在 HN 中查看
ronsor 2026/04/03 01:03
请注意，日本 X 缺乏正常 X（甚至 Bluesky）的许多政治疯狂。他们主要讨论文化、爱好、兴趣和日常活动，而不是某些政治避雷针当时正在做的任何令人发指的事情。
Note that Japanese X lacks a lot of the political insanity of normal X (or even Bluesky). They mostly discuss culture, hobbies, interests, and daily activity, rather than whatever outrageous thing some political lightning rod is doing at that moment.
在 HN 中查看
dmonitor 2026/04/03 00:58
只是为了表明我们的在线行为和趋势在多大程度上是由算法决定的。翻译按钮已经存在很多年了，但我猜有些工程师上周翻转了“在时间轴上显示国际推文”按钮，这就是结果。
Just goes to show how much our online behavior and trends are determined by algorithms. The translate button has been there for years, but I guess some engineer flipped the "show international tweets on the timeline" button last week and this is the result.
在 HN 中查看
nitwit005 2026/04/03 02:24
这并不是什么新鲜事。有谷歌翻译支持。他们最近交换了 Grok。

各种艺术、动漫和 vtuber 粉丝长期关注日本账户。

That isn't exactly new. There had been Google translate support. They swapped in Grok more recently.

The various art, anime and vtuber fans were following Japanese accounts for a long time.

在 HN 中查看
doright 2026/04/03 07:11
已经有一段时间了，我几乎只关注日本账户。有时，这是某些日本艺术家张贴作品的唯一地方。
Has been a thing for a while and I almost exclusively follow Japanese accounts. Sometimes it's the only place that certain Japanese artists post their work.
在 HN 中查看
krapp 2026/04/03 07:18
我也是。我删除了所有的帖子、评论、点赞和关注，除了几个日本账户（主要是西谷绫，《真女神转生》的作者，她有时用英语发布了很多关于日本和西方神秘主义的有趣内容。）
Me too. I deleted all of my posts, comments, likes and follows except for a couple of Japanese accounts (primarily Aya Nishitani, author of Shin Megami Tensei, who posts a lot of interesting stuff about Japanese and Western occultism sometimes in English.)

guywithahat 2026/04/03 00:14
可以确认日语 X 很棒，翻译功能总体来说很有趣，而且效果非常好，我没有意识到推文被翻译了最长的时间。
Can confirm Japanese X is great, the translate feature in general is a lot of fun and works incredibly well, I didn't realize the tweets were translated for the longest time.

(X as in Twitter, for those this clarification saves a click.)
